2026/06/30 17:06:39 PG Send: {"Type":"Parse","Name":"","Query":"-- =============================================================\n-- Ryan English — Initial Schema\n-- Chạy file này trong Supabase SQL Editor\n-- =============================================================\n\n-- ── 1. profiles (tự động tạo khi user đăng ký) ──────────────\ncreate table if not exists public.profiles (\n  id              uuid primary key references auth.users(id) on delete cascade,\n  email           text not null,\n  display_name    text,\n  avatar_url      text,\n  plan            text not null default 'free'\n                  check (plan in ('free','trial','basic','pro','lifetime')),\n  plan_expires_at timestamptz,\n  created_at      timestamptz not null default now(),\n  updated_at      timestamptz not null default now()\n)","ParameterOIDs":null}
2026/06/30 17:06:39 PG Send: {"Type":"Bind","DestinationPortal":"","PreparedStatement":"","ParameterFormatCodes":null,"Parameters":[],"ResultFormatCodes":[]}

2026/06/30 17:06:39 PG Send: {"Type":"Execute","Portal":"","MaxRows":0}
2026/06/30 17:06:39 PG Send: {"Type":"Parse","Name":"","Query":"-- Trigger: tạo profile tự động khi user đăng nhập lần đầu\ncreate or replace function public.handle_new_user()\nreturns trigger language plpgsql security definer as $$\nbegin\n  insert into public.profiles (id, email, display_name, avatar_url)\n  values (\n    new.id,\n    new.email,\n    new.raw_user_meta_data-\u003e\u003e'full_name',\n    new.raw_user_meta_data-\u003e\u003e'avatar_url'\n  )\n  on conflict (id) do update set\n    email        = excluded.email,\n    display_name = coalesce(excluded.display_name, profiles.display_name),\n    avatar_url   = coalesce(excluded.avatar_url,   profiles.avatar_url),\n    updated_at   = now();\n  return new;\nend;\n$$","ParameterOIDs":null}

2026/06/30 17:06:39 PG Send: {"Type":"Parse","Name":"","Query":"-- ── 4. srs ──────────────────────────────────────────────────\ncreate table if not exists public.srs (\n  card_id         uuid primary key references public.cards(id) on delete cascade,\n  user_id         uuid not null references auth.users(id) on delete cascade,\n  ease            numeric(4,2) not null default 2.5,\n  interval_days   int not null default 0,\n  reps            int not null default 0,\n  lapses          int not null default 0,\n  due_at          timestamptz not null default now(),\n  last_reviewed_at timestamptz,\n  state           text not null default 'new'\n                  check (state in ('new','learning','review')),\n  updated_at      timestamptz not null default now()\n)","ParameterOIDs":null}
